_meta.note: Static FX book seeded at startup (like pricing.json). Each rate is the USD value of ONE unit of the currency, so amount_usd = major_units * rate. USD is the base (implicit 1.0). A currency absent here is stored at 1:1 and flagged 'unconverted' by the margin surface — add its rate rather than relying on the fallback. Minor-unit decimals (JPY=0, KWD=3, ...) are handled in code (crates/billing/src/fx.rs), NOT here: rates are on major units. These are a periodic manual snapshot, NOT a live feed — margins are as fresh as this file. Override the path with LIGHTTRACK_FX_RATES. See docs/CURRENCY.md.
_meta.rates_are: USD value of one major unit of the currency
